---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
subtitle: "`r params$report_subtitle`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y, %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
params:
  sc_obj: NULL
  markers_data: NULL
  pathway_results: NULL
  pathway_db: NULL
  correlated_genes: NULL
  corr_target_gene: NULL
  sections: NULL
  reduction: "umap"
  group_by: "seurat_clusters"
  report_title: "Analyse Single-Cell"
  report_subtitle: ""
  report_notes: ""
  interactive: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=9, fig.height=6)
sections <- params$sections
obj      <- params$sc_obj
`%||%`   <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

render_plot <- function(p, allow_interactive=TRUE) {
  if (allow_interactive && isTRUE(params$interactive) && knitr::is_html_output() &&
      requireNamespace("plotly", quietly=TRUE)) return(plotly::ggplotly(p))
  p
}

.has_corr    <- !is.null(params$correlated_genes) && !is.null(params$corr_target_gene) &&
                is.data.frame(params$correlated_genes) && nrow(params$correlated_genes) > 0
.has_markers <- !is.null(params$markers_data)    && nrow(params$markers_data)    > 0
.has_pathway <- !is.null(params$pathway_results) && nrow(params$pathway_results) > 0
.has_traj    <- !is.null(obj) && "pseudotime" %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)
.has_singler <- !is.null(obj) && length(grep("^SingleR_", colnames(obj@meta.data))) > 0

# Safe reduction picker — braces required to avoid "else inattendu" parse error
.pick_red <- function(preferred) {
  reds <- names(obj@reductions)
  if (preferred %in% reds) preferred else if (length(reds) > 0) reds[1] else NULL
}
```

```{r notes_section, eval=nzchar(params$report_notes), results='asis'}
cat("> ", gsub("\n", "\n> ", params$report_notes), "\n\n", sep="")
```

# Résumé

```{r resume}
if (!is.null(obj)) {
  cat(sprintf("Cellules : %s  |  Gènes : %s  |  Échantillon(s) : %d\n",
              format(ncol(obj), big.mark=","), format(nrow(obj), big.mark=","),
              length(unique(obj$orig.ident))))
} else { cat("Aucun objet Single-Cell disponible.") }
```

---

```{r qc_section, eval="qc" %in% sections && !is.null(obj), results='asis'}
cat("# QC — Contrôle Qualité\n\n")
```
```{r qc_plot, eval="qc" %in% sections && !is.null(obj)}
qc_ft <- intersect(c("nFeature_RNA","nCount_RNA","percent.mt"), colnames(obj@meta.data))
if (length(qc_ft) > 0) VlnPlot(obj, features=qc_ft, ncol=length(qc_ft), pt.size=0)
```

---

```{r dim_section, eval="dim" %in% sections && !is.null(obj), results='asis'}
cat("# Réduction Dimensionnelle —", toupper(params$reduction), "\n\n")
```
```{r dim_plot, eval="dim" %in% sections && !is.null(obj)}
red <- .pick_red(params$reduction)
if (!is.null(red)) {
  render_plot(DimPlot(obj, reduction=red, group.by=params$group_by, label=TRUE, pt.size=0.5) +
              ggtitle(paste(toupper(red), "—", params$group_by)))
} else { cat("Aucune réduction calculée — lancez le Pipeline.") }
```

---

```{r annot_section, eval="annotation" %in% sections && .has_singler, results='asis'}
cat("# Annotation Automatique (SingleR)\n\n")
```
```{r annot_plot, eval="annotation" %in% sections && .has_singler}
col_use <- tail(grep("^SingleR_", colnames(obj@meta.data), value=TRUE), 1)
red_a   <- .pick_red("umap")
if (!is.null(red_a)) {
  render_plot(DimPlot(obj, reduction=red_a, group.by=col_use,
                      label=TRUE, repel=TRUE, pt.size=0.5) +
              ggtitle(paste("SingleR:", col_use)))
} else { cat("UMAP non calculé.") }
```

---

```{r markers_section, eval="markers" %in% sections && .has_markers, results='asis'}
cat("# Marqueurs Différentiels\n\n")
```
```{r markers_table_html, eval="markers" %in% sections && .has_markers && knitr::is_html_output()}
build_markers_dt(params$markers_data)
```
```{r markers_table_pdf, eval="markers" %in% sections && .has_markers && !knitr::is_html_output()}
df <- params$markers_data
knitr::kable(head(data.frame(Gene=df$gene, Cluster=df$cluster,
                              Log2FC=round(df$avg_log2FC,3),
                              P_adj=format(df$p_val_adj,scientific=TRUE,digits=3))[order(df$p_val_adj),], 50),
             caption="Top 50 marqueurs")
```

---

```{r corr_section, eval="correlation" %in% sections && .has_corr, results='asis'}
cat("# Réseau de Corrélation —", params$corr_target_gene %||% "", "\n\n")
```
```{r corr_plot, eval="correlation" %in% sections && .has_corr}
plot_gene_correlation_network(params$correlated_genes, params$corr_target_gene, top_n=20)
```

---

```{r pathway_section, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway, results='asis'}
cat("# Pathway Enrichment —", params$pathway_db %||% "", "\n\n")
```
```{r pathway_barplot, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway}
plot_pathway_barplot(params$pathway_results, db_label=params$pathway_db %||% "", top_n=15)
```
```{r pathway_table_html, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway && knitr::is_html_output()}
build_pathway_dt(params$pathway_results)
```
```{r pathway_table_pdf, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway && !knitr::is_html_output()}
cols <- intersect(c("ID","Description","p.adjust","Count","GeneRatio"), colnames(params$pathway_results))
knitr::kable(head(params$pathway_results[, cols, drop=FALSE], 20))
```

---

```{r traj_section, eval="trajectory" %in% sections && .has_traj, results='asis'}
cat("# Trajectory Analysis — Pseudotemps\n\n")
```
```{r traj_plot, eval="trajectory" %in% sections && .has_traj}
red_t <- .pick_red("umap")
if (!is.null(red_t)) {
  render_plot(plot_trajectory(seurat_obj=obj, reduction=red_t, color_by="pseudotime"))
}
```
```{r traj_dist, eval="trajectory" %in% sections && .has_traj}
df_t <- data.frame(pseudotime=obj@meta.data$pseudotime,
                   cluster=as.character(obj@meta.data$seurat_clusters))
ggplot(df_t, aes(x=pseudotime, fill=cluster)) +
  geom_density(alpha=0.6) + scale_fill_viridis_d(option="turbo") +
  labs(title="Distribution du Pseudotemps par Cluster", x="Pseudotemps", y="Densité") +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

<small>Rapport généré automatiquement par TranscriptoShiny — module Single-Cell.</small>
